title: payment — settings
description: Tenant-facing payment configuration + per-user preferences for payment notifications. The payment_providers table is NOT settings — those are per-provider credentials owned by the payment module itself. This file declares tenant-level defaults (default provider, 3DS2 thresholds, dispute defaults) + per-user preferences (payment notification subscription).

groups.label: Payment processing
groups.description: Tenant-wide defaults for payment captures + provider routing.

sections.label: Provider defaults
sections.description: Which provider handles new payment intents when the caller doesn't specify.

fields.name: default_provider
fields.label: Default provider
fields.helpText: Fallback provider when the caller doesn't specify one at intent creation.

fields.name: regional_provider_routing
fields.label: Regional routing
fields.helpText: Route customers from specific country codes to specific providers. Example: {US: stripe, EU: adyen, GB: adyen}. Overrides default_provider.

fields.name: sca_threshold_cents
fields.label: 3DS2 required over amount
fields.helpText: Card transactions above this amount require 3DS2. Default €30 (3000 cents) matches PSD2 SCA threshold. In EU regions the PSD2 threshold is legally mandated; you can only INCREASE the requirement (lower threshold), not decrease it.

fields.name: force_3ds2
fields.label: Force 3DS2 on all card transactions
fields.helpText: Enterprise-only. Requires 3DS2 on every card transaction regardless of amount. Increases friction but reduces fraud risk.

fields.name: default_capture_method
fields.label: Default capture method
fields.helpText: Manual capture holds funds without transferring them. Useful for pre-authorized bookings. Requires payment_manual_capture entitlement.

fields.name: intent_timeout_hours
fields.label: Intent timeout (hours)
fields.helpText: Payment intents in non-terminal status for longer than this are automatically cancelled.

fields.name: auto_approve_risk_threshold
fields.label: Auto-approve risk score threshold
fields.helpText: Payments with provider risk score below this threshold auto-approve. Above → route to review queue.

fields.name: auto_collect_evidence
fields.label: Auto-collect dispute evidence
fields.helpText: When a dispute opens, automatically collect supporting evidence (invoice, membership, communication log, refund policy) into an evidence pack.

fields.name: high_value_dispute_threshold_cents
fields.label: High-value dispute threshold
fields.helpText: Disputes above this amount fire as P1 notifications. Default $500.

fields.name: dispute_notify_users
fields.label: Notify these users on new disputes
fields.helpText: Every user listed receives PaymentDisputeOpenedNotification. Tenant owners always notified regardless.

sections.label: Notifications routing
sections.description: Where circuit-breaker alerts + reconcile drift alerts are delivered.

fields.name: circuit_breaker_notify_users
fields.label: Notify these users on circuit-breaker opens

fields.name: reconcile_drift_notify_users
fields.label: Notify these users on reconcile drift

fields.name: receive_payment_receipts
fields.label: Send me payment receipts by email

fields.name: receive_method_expiring_alerts
fields.label: Notify me when my saved cards are about to expire
